hero.label: Digital Energy
hero.title: We build digital products that transform markets
hero.desc: We are a digital innovation group. We design, develop and launch our own technology platforms — from concept to market.

what.label: What We Do
what.title: Not a traditional consultancy
what.desc: Digital Energy identifies market opportunities, creates digital products and drives them to success. Every project is born from our vision and developed internally through Hub DE, our technology arm.

ideation.title: Ideation & Strategy
ideation.desc: We identify market gaps and develop product concepts with validated business models.

development.title: Development & Technology
development.desc: Through Hub DE we build SaaS platforms, apps and AI solutions with cutting-edge technologies.

launch.title: Launch & Growth
launch.desc: We bring products to market with go-to-market strategies, digital marketing and continuous optimization.

investment.title: Investments & Advisory
investment.desc: Strategic advisory for real estate investments, project funding and international partnerships.

projects.label: Our Projects
projects.title: Portfolio
projects.desc: Digital products created, developed and managed by Digital Energy. We currently have 3 more projects in development.

oryx.label: Premium Mobility
oryx.title: ORYX
oryx.desc: Private luxury mobility platform. Shuttle, chauffeur, security, yacht charter and reservations in exclusive destinations like Ibiza, Mykonos, Dubai and Monaco.

calcolopro.label: SaaS Platform
calcolopro.title: CalcoloPro+
calcolopro.desc: Professional portfolio management platform with automated OCR data extraction, real-time analytics dashboard and Telegram bot integration.

hubde.label: Software Studio
hubde.title: Hub Digital Energy
hubde.desc: Our software development studio. Specializing in SaaS platforms, automation, analytics dashboards, AI integrations and digital consulting.

about.label: About Us
about.title: A group that builds, not just advises
about.desc1: Digital Energy is a European-based digital innovation group. We don't offer generic consulting — we create our own digital products and bring them to the international market.
about.desc2: From luxury mobility to fintech, from software development to real estate opportunities, we operate where we see digital transformation potential.
about.desc3: Every project is born from our vision, developed by our team and grows with our continuous support.

ownership.title: Ownership
ownership.desc: We build our own products. We believe in them, use them, grow them.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.desc: Highest standards in design, technology and user experience.

speed.title: Speed
speed.desc: From concept to market quickly, without compromising quality.

global.title: Global Vision
global.desc: We think and operate internationally from day one.

s1.title: Discovery
s1.desc: Market analysis, opportunity identification, concept validation.

s2.title: Build
s2.desc: Design, development and platform testing through Hub DE.

s4.title: Scale
s4.desc: Optimization, new market expansion, sustainable growth.

cta.title: Have a project in mind?
cta.desc: Whether it's a partnership, investment or tech collaboration, we're open to exploring new opportunities.

contact.label: Contact
contact.desc: We're always open to new collaboration, partnership and investment opportunities. Tell us your idea.

form.name: Name
form.sentDesc: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

footer.desc: Digital innovation group. We create, develop and launch our own technology products.

cookies.message: We use technical cookies to ensure the site works properly and analytics cookies to improve your experience.

what.title: What Are Cookies
what.content: Cookies are small text files that websites store on your device while browsing. They help the site function and improve user experience.

types.title: Types of Cookies Used
types.content: Technical cookies: necessary for the site to function (session, language preferences). No consent required. Analytics cookies: Google Analytics, used to analyze traffic anonymously. Activated only with your consent.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Cookies
thirdParty.content: The site may use third-party services (Google Analytics) that install their own cookies. These services have their own privacy policies.

manage.title: Managing Cookies
manage.content: You can manage cookie preferences at any time from your browser settings. Disabling some cookies may affect site functionality.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: Digital Energy Ltd. is committed to protecting your privacy.

data.title: Data Collected
data.content: We only collect data you voluntarily provide through our contact form.

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.content: We use your data exclusively to respond to your inquiries.

retention.title: Retention
retention.content: Data is retained only as long as needed to handle your request.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: You can request access, rectification or deletion by contacting info@digitalenergy.solutions.

general.title: General
general.content: This website is operated by Digital Energy Ltd.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.content: All content is property of Digital Energy Ltd.

liability.title: Liability
liability.content: Information is provided for informational purposes only.
